effect: [Main] If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, add up to 1 card with a [Trigger] other than [Black Vortex] from your trash to your hand.
name: Black Vortex
trigger: [Trigger] Negate the effect of up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards during this turn.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
